title: SIM-Check
description: A simple plugin that lets moderators call players for a cheat check.
body:
# SIMCheck  
**The best plugin for cheat checks.**

---

## 🔧 Commands
- **/check** – Call a player for a cheat check via **AnyDesk**  
- **/ca** – Call a player for a cheat check via **Discord**

---

## ⚙️ Features
- If a player gets stuck floating in the air, they will be teleported to the nearest block below.  
- While a player is on a cheat check, they cannot be attacked.  
- After a moderator calls a player for a check, a **bossbar with the check timer** will appear.  
  - *(Note: This feature was removed in the latest version.)*  
- When the timer ends, the moderator receives a message that the player can be banned.  
- **Auto-ban system** included, fully configurable.  
- Customizable **sounds** in `config.yml`.

---

## 📌 Requirements
- **AntiRelog by leymoo** (plugin will not work without it).
